description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a clean, rectilinear design and a mix of white and wood-toned exterior finishes. The structure is surrounded by a low white perimeter wall and features landscaped gardens, a swimming pool, and multiple outdoor seating areas. Large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The front includes a covered carport and a driveway, while the rear opens to a private pool and patio. Several trees and shrubs are integrated into the landscaping, adding greenery and privacy. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with strong horizontal lines and open-plan living emphasized.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and wood finishes, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a private pool. The design is minimalist and open, with outdoor living spaces and a covered carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport, driveway, and a glimpse of the pool and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and a long stretch of garden along the side of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the expansive patio, pool area, and large sliding glass doors opening to the outdoor living space.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the pool, patio, and rear facade with large windows and outdoor seating, as well as the garden and driveway entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
